property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\user\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;.

testcase.name: resetPassword_Expired_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.193+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.194+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] resetPassword: Resetting password for recovery token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.195+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] resetPassword: Reset link EXPIRED for user 'testuser'

testcase.name: signup_DuplicateName_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.197+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.198+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: Processing signup for name='testuser', email='test@example.com' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.198+05:30 DEBUG 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: emailExists=false, nameExists=true 2026-06-22T16:18:29.198+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: DUPLICATE detected. emailExists=false, nameExists=true

testcase.name: loginWithToken_Expired_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.199+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.199+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] loginWithToken: Verifying magic link token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.200+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] loginWithToken: Recovery link EXPIRED for user 'testuser'

testcase.name: loginWithToken_NotFound_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.200+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.201+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] loginWithToken: Verifying magic link token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.201+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] loginWithToken: Invalid recovery link token

testcase.name: login_UserNotFound_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.202+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.202+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Processing login for name='unknown' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.203+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: User NOT FOUND with name='unknown'

testcase.name: getCredentialsByToken_NoExpiry_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.203+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.203+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Looking up user by remember token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.204+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Remember token EXPIRED for name='testuser'

testcase.name: getCredentialsByToken_Expired_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.206+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.206+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Looking up user by remember token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.206+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Remember token EXPIRED for name='testuser'

testcase.name: loginWithRememberMe_SetsToken
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Processing login for name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 DEBUG 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: User found in DB. id=1, name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Password verified for name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Remember-me token generated for name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.208+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: JWT token generated for name='testuser'. Login SUCCESS

testcase.name: processForgotPassword_EmailFailure_LogsError
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.210+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.211+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Processing forgot password request for user: testuser 2026-06-22T16:18:29.213+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Recovery token generated. Sending recovery link to: test@example.com 2026-06-22T16:18:29.213+05:30 ERROR 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Failed to send recovery email to 'test@example.com': RuntimeException - Mail server down

testcase.name: resetPassword_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.216+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.216+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] resetPassword: Resetting password for recovery token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.217+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] resetPassword: Password reset successfully for user: testuser

testcase.name: login_InvalidPassword_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.218+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.218+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Processing login for name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.218+05:30 DEBUG 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: User found in DB. id=1, name='testuser' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.218+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] login: Password MISMATCH for name='testuser'

testcase.name: processForgotPassword_NoEmail_NoEmailSent
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.219+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.220+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Processing forgot password request for user: testuser 2026-06-22T16:18:29.220+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: User testuser has no email associated

testcase.name: getCredentialsByToken_NotFound_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.228+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.245+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Looking up user by remember token 2026-06-22T16:18:29.246+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] getCredentialsByToken: Invalid remember token

testcase.name: processForgotPassword_SendsEmail
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.247+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.248+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Processing forgot password request for user: testuser 2026-06-22T16:18:29.248+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Recovery token generated. Sending recovery link to: test@example.com 2026-06-22T16:18:29.248+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] processForgotPassword: Recovery email sent successfully to: test@example.com

testcase.name: signup_DuplicateUser_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.290+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.291+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: Processing signup for name='testuser', email='test@example.com' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.291+05:30 DEBUG 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: emailExists=true, nameExists=false 2026-06-22T16:18:29.291+05:30 WARN 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: DUPLICATE detected. emailExists=true, nameExists=false

testcase.name: signup_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T16:18:29.292+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] Initialized with all dependencies 2026-06-22T16:18:29.293+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: Processing signup for name='testuser', email='test@example.com' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.293+05:30 DEBUG 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: emailExists=false, nameExists=false 2026-06-22T16:18:29.293+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: Saving new user to database: name='testuser', email='test@example.com' 2026-06-22T16:18:29.293+05:30 INFO 4376 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AuthService : [AuthService] signup: User SAVED successfully. id=1, name='testuser', email='test@example.com'
